summary: Incomplete deliverable: fixture files (junit-run1.xml, junit-run2.xml, json-run3.json) referenced in workflow but not provided. Critical security gap: actions/checkout@v4 must be pinned to full-length SHA per requirements. Script has solid practices (Set-StrictMode, error handling, type validation, safe XML parsing) with clean separation of concerns. Cannot ship without fixtures and action pinning fix.
